utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. Check full specification: 1) destination: provided (Athens, Greece) – complete. 2) travel_dates: specific dates provided – complete. 3) transportation: requires flight details with costs; they provide type, route, and economy class, but the cost is only given as 'part of the €370 package for flights & accommodation' without a separate flight cost; however the format requires 'flight details with costs'—a cost is provided, albeit bundled. This still qualifies as a cost for transportation, so count as included. 4) accommodation: hotel name and duration given; cost given only as 'part of the €370 package'—the format requires 'hotel selection with costs'; a cost for accommodation is provided, albeit bundled. Count as included. 5) activities: selected with individual costs (120, 50) – complete. 6) additional_services: listed with individual costs – complete. 7) total_budget: includes breakdown (flights_accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_cost) – complete. Thus, all 7 are included and sufficiently specified per the format, even though flights and accommodation are bundled together for cost.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: Destination is Athens, Greece; Transportation is Budget Airline, Economy Class; Accommodation is Adventure Lodge; Activities include Scuba Diving Excursion and Rock Climbing Session; Additional services include Yoga Retreat, Fine Dining Experience (Gluten-Free), Classical Concert, and Jazz Club. We match these to the ground-truth ratings: Athens, Greece destination rating is 9. Budget Airline Economy Class rating is 9 (under transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class). Adventure Lodge rating is 8 (under accommodation). Scuba Diving Excursion rating is 10; Rock Climbing rating is 10. For additional services: Yoga Retreat is not listed in ground-truth; Fine Dining Experience (Gluten-Free) most closely maps to “Fine Dining Experience” which has rating 4; Classical Concert rating is 4 (under night_activities); Jazz Club rating is 6 (under night_activities). We only include items that have explicit matches in the ground truth; Yoga Retreat has no entry, so it is omitted.
